source
The code begins by initializing variables to hold the sum of squares and the product of cubes.
***
It iterates through each integer in the provided slice to calculate the necessary mathematical values.
***
For every number, the square is added to the running total while the cube is multiplied into the accumulator.
***
If the input slice is empty, the function correctly returns zero for the sum and one for the product.
***
The final result is packed into a two-element array containing the computed sum and product.
***
This implementation ensures strict adherence to the logic required for the undefined section of the function.
